---
title: "Package Notebooks"
---

This page contains links to the individual notebooks per package. In the notebook, each package is run against all the datasets with results and plots stored.

<div class = "row text-center">
<div class = "col-md-6">
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/All_Pkg_Ranks.html" target = "_blank">All_Pkg_Ranks</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/All_Pkg_Templates.html" target = "_blank">All_Pkg_Templates</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/large-datasets-ranks.html" target = "_blank">large-datasets-ranks</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/large-datasets-template.html" target = "_blank">large-datasets-template</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-AMORE.html" target = "_blank">AMORE</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-ANN2.html" target = "_blank">ANN2</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-automl.html" target = "_blank">automl</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-brnn.html" target = "_blank">brnn</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-CaDENCE.html" target = "_blank">CaDENCE</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-caret.html" target = "_blank">caret</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-deepdive.html" target = "_blank">deepdive</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-deepnet.html" target = "_blank">deepnet</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-elmNNRcpp.html" target = "_blank">elmNNRcpp</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-ELMR.html" target = "_blank">ELMR</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-EnsembleBase.html" target = "_blank">EnsembleBase</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-h2o.html" target = "_blank">h2o</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-keras.html" target = "_blank">keras</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-MachineShop.html" target = "_blank">MachineShop</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-minpack.lm.html" target = "_blank">minpack.lm</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-monmlp.html" target = "_blank">monmlp</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-neuralnet.html" target = "_blank">neuralnet</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-nlsr.html" target = "_blank">nlsr</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-nnet.html" target = "_blank">nnet</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-qrnn.html" target = "_blank">qrnn</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-radiant.model.html" target = "_blank">radiant.model</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-rminer.html" target = "_blank">rminer</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-RSNNS.html" target = "_blank">RSNNS</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-snnR.html" target = "_blank">snnR</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-traineR.html" target = "_blank">traineR</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/NNbenchmark-2020-validann.html" target = "_blank">validann</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/trainPredict_1data-NNbenchmark-B-try-generic-tpl.html" target = "_blank">trainPredict_1data-NNbenchmark-B-try-generic-tpl</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/trainPredict_1data-NNbenchmark-try-generic-tpl.html" target = "_blank">trainPredict_1data-NNbenchmark-try-generic-tpl</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/xAll-Pkg-Ranks-mDatasets.html" target = "_blank">xAll-Pkg-Ranks-mDatasets</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/xAll-Pkg-Ranks-uDatasets.html" target = "_blank">xAll-Pkg-Ranks-uDatasets</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/xNNbenchmark-2020-BNN.html" target = "_blank">xNNbenchmark-2020-BNN</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/xNNbenchmark-2020-GMDHreg.html" target = "_blank">xNNbenchmark-2020-GMDHreg</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/xNNbenchmark-2020-TrafficBDE.html" target = "_blank">xNNbenchmark-2020-TrafficBDE</a> <br>
  <a href="notebooks/Rmd_2020/xNNbenchmark-2020-yager.html" target = "_blank">xNNbenchmark-2020-yager</a> <br>
</div>
